name: Security report (DO NOT USE FOR ACTUAL VULNS)
about: Public security tracking (NOT for active vulnerabilities)
title: "[security] <short summary>"
labels: [security, triage]
assignees: []
---

> **STOP — this template is NOT for active vulnerabilities.**
>
> If you have discovered a security vulnerability, **do not file a public issue.**
>
> Email **`security@prometheus.app`** with details. PGP key: `https://prometheus.app/security/pgp.txt`.
>
> Acknowledgement within 24 hours. Bug bounty payouts per `docs/SECURITY.md` §5.
>
> See `docs/security.txt` for the full policy.

---

## What this template is for
- Tracking **already-disclosed** security work (post-fix follow-up, hardening, audit-finding follow-up)
- Public security improvements that do NOT reveal active vulnerabilities
- Compliance-related tracking issues (SOC 2, ISO 27001 milestones)
